ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2002_01_10:
Passenger [Name:PlayerNickname ],
you’ve arrived at the lodge right on
schedule!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2003_01_10:
I am Emmet. I was waiting for you to come
today, [Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2101_01_10: This could be useful. I want you to have it.
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2101_02_10:
If you want more, I can bring you something
else, too!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2102_01_10:
I brought this today. I want to give it to you,
[Name:PlayerNickname ].
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2102_02_10:
If you use it right, I’m sure it will prove
verrrrry handy!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2103_01_10: Here you go. The best present I could find!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2103_02_10:
It would make me so happy if you enjoyed
it, [Name:PlayerNickname ]. I’ll bring you
more presents!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2103_03_10: I hope the next one brings us smiles, too!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2202_01_10:
I couldn’t wait to talk to you,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2203_01_10: When we talk, I feel very excited!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2302_01_10:
Thank you, [Name:PlayerNickname ]!
I’ll use your present with care!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2301_01_10: Check safety. Ready to receive your present!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2301_02_10:
I’m so verrrrry happy! I’ll definitely return
the favor!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2402_01_10: That was so fun! Let’s talk again soon!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2401_01_10:
I had so much fun spending time with you,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8201_2401_02_10:
I’m sure we’ll meet here again. Because we
still have more to talk about!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8001_0701_01_10:
Even here at the lodge, what I do and what
I say is always the same.
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8001_0701_03_10:
Let’s broaden our connections and chitchat
with everyone!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8002_0701_01_10:
Being “serious” isn’t the only way to have a
serious battle.
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8002_0701_02_10:
If I hadn’t come to Pasio, maybe I never
would’ve learned that.
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8002_0701_03_10:
You don’t have to stay on the same track all
the time. Exploring different routes is
important, too!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8003_0701_01_10:
Teaming up for tag battles and clashing
head-on...
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8003_0701_02_10:
By repeating those things with another,
you’ll deepen your bond with them!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8003_0701_03_10:
It’s strange, since the two are totally
opposite. But now I see why it works!
ch0109_00_kudari_salon/8003_0701_04_10:
Either way, you’re serious about facing
each other!
